basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Calicut. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Environmental Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Life Sciences with an aggregate minimum of 60% marks or CGPA/CPI grading of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or equivalent, with a GATE/NET qualified.
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Environmental Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Life Sciences with an aggregate minimum of 60% marks (average of all semesters) or CGPA/CPI grading of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or equivalent, with a GATE/NET qualified. Experience in designing and monitoring experimental setup (Desirable)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Biotechnology, or Life Sciences with at least 60% marks or an equivalent CGPA, and must have qualified in GATE/NET.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview. The interview will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, along with 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Calicut must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their duly filled application form and supporting documents to the provided email addresses.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Along with the duly filled application form, candidates must submit their most recent CV and soft copies of mark sheets and certificates supporting their academic qualifications and any relevant experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment at NIT Calicut does not mention any application fee. Therefore, it is presumed that there is no fee required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the date of the interview for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates for the Junior Research Fellow position is scheduled to be held on 06th July 2026. This will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with relevant experience apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, while a Master's degree and GATE/NET qualification are mandatory, experience in designing and monitoring experimental setup is considered desirable and may be advantageous for applicants.
